Legal

Disclaimer

Important information about the nature and limitations of our services.

Last Updated: June 1, 2026

1. General Disclaimer

The information provided on this website and through the services of Bridge Point Advisory is intended for general informational purposes only. While we strive to provide accurate, current, and professional information, we make no representations or warranties of any kind — express or implied — about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of any information contained on this site or provided through our services.

Important: Bridge Point Advisory is a research and advisory firm. We are not attorneys, financial advisors, or licensed legal professionals. Nothing on this website or in our communications constitutes legal, financial, or professional advice.

2. Not Legal Advice

Bridge Point Advisory is not a law firm. No attorney-client relationship is created by your use of this website, submission of a contact form, or any communication with our team. The information we provide is research-based advisory guidance only.

You are strongly encouraged to consult with a licensed attorney in your jurisdiction before making any legal decisions, signing any legal documents, or pursuing any formal legal claims. The laws governing surplus funds, foreclosure overages, and unclaimed property vary significantly by state and locality and are subject to change.

3. Not Financial Advice

Nothing on this website or provided through our services constitutes financial advice, investment advice, or tax advice. Any potential recovery amounts referenced are illustrative only and are not guarantees of any specific outcome.

We recommend consulting with a qualified financial advisor or tax professional regarding any financial decisions related to a potential funds recovery.

4. No Guarantee of Recovery

The identification of potential surplus funds or foreclosure overages through our research does not guarantee that those funds will be successfully recovered. Recovery depends on numerous factors outside our control, including but not limited to:

  • The specific laws and claim procedures of the relevant jurisdiction
  • Whether the claim window is still open and has not expired
  • The accuracy and completeness of public records
  • The decisions and processing timelines of the relevant court or government authority
  • Whether competing claims or legal challenges exist
  • The client's ability to provide required documentation

Past research outcomes or client experiences described on this website are not indicative of future results.

5. Accuracy of Public Records Research

Our research is based on publicly available records, which may contain errors, omissions, or outdated information. Bridge Point Advisory makes every reasonable effort to ensure the accuracy of its research findings, but cannot guarantee the completeness or accuracy of public records obtained from third-party sources, government databases, or county repositories.

All research findings are provided as advisory information only and should be independently verified before any formal action is taken.

6. Third-Party Content and Links

This website may reference or link to third-party websites, resources, or services. Bridge Point Advisory does not endorse, control, or assume any responsibility for the content, accuracy, or practices of any third-party websites. We are not liable for any loss or damage that may arise from your use of third-party content or services.

7. Testimonials and Client Experiences

Any testimonials or client experiences featured on this website reflect the individual experiences of specific clients and are not necessarily representative of all clients' experiences. Individual results may vary based on personal circumstances, jurisdiction, the specifics of each case, and other factors. Testimonials are not intended to represent or guarantee that anyone will achieve the same or similar results.

8. Jurisdictional Limitations

The services offered by Bridge Point Advisory are advisory and research-based in nature. We operate in accordance with applicable laws. Availability of certain services, the enforceability of agreements, and the viability of claims may vary based on the laws of your specific state, county, or jurisdiction. It is your responsibility to ensure compliance with all applicable local laws before engaging in any claims process.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Bridge Point Advisory, its owners, employees, contractors, and affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from:

  • Your use of, or inability to use, this website or our services
  • Any reliance placed on information provided through our research or communications
  • Any errors or omissions in public records or third-party data
  • Any delays, interruptions, or failures in the claims process
  • Decisions made by government authorities or courts regarding claims

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Disclaimer or the nature of our services, please do not hesitate to contact us at manbridgepointadvisory@gmail.com. We are committed to transparency and are happy to clarify any aspect of our services before you engage with us.

Still Have Questions?

Transparency is a core value at Bridge Point Advisory. We're here to help you understand exactly what we do and how we can assist you.
